inputs.label: Conversion Factor (g/mg)
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from mg to g, may be adjusted for traceability

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output to meet precision requirements

inputs.label: Batch Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for batch scaling, e.g., number of units

inputs.label: Rounding Mode (0=round,1=floor,2=ceil)
inputs.businessContext: Rounding mode for compliance with rounding rules

formulas.grams: roundingMode == 0 ? Math.round(rawGrams * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces) : roundingMode == 1 ? Math.floor(rawGrams * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces) : Math.ceil(rawGrams * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)
